languages.text: Таинственный ксеноартефакт, названный анкер-ядром, был признан уничтоженным в кузницах Алтаря-Темплума. Лишь спустя сотни лет он был обнаружен в останках технохрама как безмолвное свидетельство того, что ксеноеретическая схизма все же нашла дорогу в умы обитателей станции.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.
languages.original_text: Таинственный ксеноартефакт, названный анкер-ядром, был признан уничтоженным в кузницах Алтаря-Темплума. Лишь спустя сотни лет он был обнаружен в останках технохрама как безмолвное свидетельство того, что ксеноеретическая схизма все же нашла дорогу в умы обитателей станции.

traits.locale_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

languages.text: 謎の異星遺物「アンカーコア」は、アルター・テンプルにある鍛冶場で破壊されたと見られていた。しかし、何百年も経った後に、テクノ・テンプル跡から発見された。異星教の分裂が、このステーションの人々の心に根付いたことを、静かに証明する証拠であった。
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: 謎の異星遺物「アンカーコア」は、アルター・テンプルにある鍛冶場で破壊されたと見られていた。しかし、何百年も経った後に、テクノ・テンプル跡から発見された。異星教の分裂が、このステーションの人々の心に根付いたことを、静かに証明する証拠であった。

languages.text: 名为“锚核”的神秘异形造物在祭坛的熔炉中被毁。直到几百年后，它才在科技神庙的遗迹中被发现，成为异形异端早已在星站居民心中生根发芽的无声铁证。
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: 名为“锚核”的神秘异形造物在祭坛的熔炉中被毁。直到几百年后，它才在科技神庙的遗迹中被发现，成为异形异端早已在星站居民心中生根发芽的无声铁证。

languages.text: Quelqu'un détruisit le mystérieux xéno-artefact appelé « noyau ancestral » dans les forges d'Altar-Templum. Il fallut ensuite attendre plusieurs siècles pour qu'on le redécouvre dans les vestiges du technotemple, où il constituait encore une preuve silencieuse qu'un schisme xénohérétique s'était ancré dans les esprits des habitants de la station.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Quelqu'un détruisit le mystérieux xéno-artefact appelé « noyau ancestral » dans les forges d'Altar-Templum. Il fallut ensuite attendre plusieurs siècles pour qu'on le redécouvre dans les vestiges du technotemple, où il constituait encore une preuve silencieuse qu'un schisme xénohérétique s'était ancré dans les esprits des habitants de la station.

languages.text: El misterioso xenoartefacto conocido como núcleo de anclaje se encontró destruido en las forjas de Altar-Templum. Ocurrió cientos de años después, en las ruinas del tecnotemplo, como prueba silenciosa del cisma xenoherético que había consumido las mentes de los habitantes de la estación.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: El misterioso xenoartefacto conocido como núcleo de anclaje se encontró destruido en las forjas de Altar-Templum. Ocurrió cientos de años después, en las ruinas del tecnotemplo, como prueba silenciosa del cisma xenoherético que había consumido las mentes de los habitantes de la estación.

languages.text: Çapa çekirdeği adı verilen gizemli zeno eseri, Altar-Templum'un demirhanelerinde yok edilmiş hâlde bulundu. Yüzlerce yıl sonra tekno tapınağın kalıntılarında, istasyon sakinlerinin zihinlerinde zeno kâfirliği bölünmesinin kök saldığının kanıtına rastlandı.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Çapa çekirdeği adı verilen gizemli zeno eseri, Altar-Templum'un demirhanelerinde yok edilmiş hâlde bulundu. Yüzlerce yıl sonra tekno tapınağın kalıntılarında, istasyon sakinlerinin zihinlerinde zeno kâfirliği bölünmesinin kök saldığının kanıtına rastlandı.

languages.text: Das als Ankerkern bekannte Xeno-Artefakt lag zerstört in den Schmieden von Altar-Templum. Einige hundert Jahre später wurde es in den Ruinen des Tech-Tempels als stiller Beweis dafür entdeckt, dass ein xeno-häretisches Schisma in den Bewohnern der Station Wurzeln geschlagen hatte.
languages.original_text: The mysterious xeno-artefact called the anchor-core was found destroyed in the forges of Altar-Templum. Only hundreds of years later was it discovered in the remains of the tech-temple as silent proof that a xenoheretical schism had taken root in the minds of the station's inhabitants.

Einige hundert Jahre später wurde es in den Ruinen des Tech-Tempels als stiller Beweis dafür entdeckt, dass ein xeno-häretisches Schisma in den Bewohnern der Station Wurzeln geschlagen hatte.
